hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "Workflow: /review → /test → /commit. Never use git commit directly. Review priority: Security > Correctness > Readability > Efficiency."}'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git commit 직접 사용 금지. /commit 커맨드를 사용하세요. 워크플로우: /review → /test → /commit' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
